title: SCP-513, The Cowbell
description: If you hear the bell, you will be able to see him...
body:
The Cowbell adds a new terrifying monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-513, also known as The Cowbell.


SCP-513 is an old, rusted cowbell that can naturally be found on the ground in the world. You can pick it up and carry it, but never ring it. If you do, the sound of a loud bell will emit, and you will be cursed with the Curse of the Bell effect. As a result, you'll start to see SCP-513-1, a tall, thin, gray figure with a sinister face. It watches you from a distance, but when you approach, it disappears, only to reappear elsewhere. The eerie sound of its breathing will alert you to its presence. What’s worse, SCP-513-1 can harm you while you sleep, making it even more relentless. To break the curse, your only option is to die. However, if you want to avoid SCP-513 entirely, you can imprison it in a Gel Block.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-513 spawn?

SCP-513 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-513.

</details>



![SCP-513](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd00d1fec88f8eac43d48ceb4a5e85362f72eea0.png)

SCP-513 is an old, rusted cowbell. When the player sneaks and right-clicks it, they can pick it up. However, if they don’t sneak and right-click, the bell will ring loudly, affecting all nearby players with the "Curse of the Bell" effect. This curse also applies if the bell is used in the player's inventory. If the player sneaks and uses the bell in their inventory, they can place it back down. The "Curse of the Bell" effect causes the player to start seeing SCP-513-1, a tall, slender, gray creature. The more worse the curse becomes, the more frequently SCP-513-1 appears. Whenever the player sees SCP-513-1, it will disappear shortly after, but if the player tries to sleep, SCP-513-1 will attack and cause damage.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
